summary: Tested playbook step persistence and profile reminder features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Playbook steps [1,2] persist in DB, progress bar shows 2/4, steps show green checkmarks after reload. Profile reminder: 'Send Reminder' button sends message to athlete, button changes to 'Sent' (green, disabled), toast shows, message appears in Emma's inbox.
critical_code_review_comments: Playbook progress endpoint correctly uses upsert (PATCH creates if not exists)
School-scoped playbook_checked_steps returned in school pod response (lines 415-418 of school_pod.py)
ActionPlan.js correctly syncs initialChecked via useEffect (lines 7-9)
ProfileAlert 'Send Reminder' calls POST /api/support-messages with correct payload
Button state correctly managed via useState (sending, sent) with proper disabled state
seed_data_creation: Playbook progress for Emory set to [1,2], Creighton set to [3,4] during testing. TEST_PERSIST_NOTE added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playbook persistence feature complete. Steps saved to MongoDB 'playbook_progress' collection. ActionPlan component receives initialChecked array and saves via onSave callback. Profile reminder sends via /api/support-messages. Multiple reminder messages exist in Emma's inbox from testing.

frontend_ui: Coach login via demo account - PASS
Navigate to Emma Chen's Support Pod - PASS
Profile Alert shows 67% complete with Send Reminder button - PASS
Click Send Reminder changes button to 'Sent' (green, disabled) - PASS
Toast notification 'Reminder sent to Emma Chen' - PASS
Navigate to Emory School Pod - PASS
ActionPlan shows 'Follow-Up Required' with progress 2/4 - PASS
Steps 1,2 show green checkmarks (pre-checked from DB) - PASS
Toggle step 4 changes icon to green checkmark - PASS
Step 4 persists after page reload - PASS
Notes sidebar opens via action bar button - PASS
Creighton School Pod shows 'Outreach Strategy' playbook - PASS (backend verified)
